title: document_manifest.json -- case document roster v0.4
description: The list of every document in a case and its processing status. This is a shared state file updated by multiple stages in sequence, not a single component's output -- it does not use the common output envelope. Update discipline: each stage adds only its own owner fields and never modifies fields it doesn't own (owner is documented per field below). This discipline is enforced structurally by the DAO's write_contract lock (see harness-guardrails P5), not just by convention.

updated_at.description: owner: whichever stage last updated this file

pre_flagged_type.description: owner: Case Intake. Set when a document's type is already known at intake (e.g. an insurer-response document flagged during the source-ledger review) -- classification trusts this instead of running inference. null if not pre-flagged.

ocr_status.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). Initialized to pending by Case Intake.

ocr_quality.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). Copied from ocr_result_{document_id}.json's summary. null before OCR. Detail (uncertain-region list/positions, cross-validation outcome) lives only in ocr_result_{document_id}.json -- this manifest stays a lightweight roster.

uncertain_region_count.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). Sum of ocr_result_{document_id}.json's uncertain_regions for this document. null before OCR.

cross_validation_status.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). Result of P8's dual-path (OCR engine vs. blind vision-model read) cross-validation. Mirrors ocr_result_{document_id}.json's own cross_validation_status enum -- found out of sync for real when a real resolution's write was correctly rejected by schema validation (this file hadn't been updated when 'disagreed_resolved' was added there).

document_type.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). null before classification (or copied directly from pre_flagged_type when pre-flagged).

classification_confidence.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). null before classification; null (not 1.0) when pre-flagged, since no inference confidence applies.

extraction_method.description: owner: document-pipeline (checkpoint 1). non_text_image is human-verified visual evidence that must not be converted into synthetic page text.

downstream_disposition.description: owner: document-pipeline. expert_review_only excludes the document from text redaction, chunking, and automated downstream evidence use.
